name: Absorb LMS API
what_it_does: Absorb LMS REST API for corporate learning management system. Enables AI agents to manage learner enrollment, track course completions, retrieve certification data, manage curricula and courses, and integrate training records into HRIS and compliance workflows. Absorb LMS is known for its modern UX and AI-powered recommendations.
use_cases: Enrolling employees in courses and learning paths from HR automation agents
Tracking compliance training completions from regulatory agents
Retrieving learner progress and certification data from L&D analytics agents
Integrating Absorb training records into HRIS and payroll workflow agents
not_for: Consumer self-paced learning without enterprise context
best_when: An organization using Absorb LMS wants AI agents to automate enrollment, track compliance training, and integrate learning data into HRIS systems.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee learning records and assessment data are personal data. Handle per employment law and GDPR.

auth.notes: Absorb LMS API uses private key + username/password authentication to generate session tokens. Token-based auth with session management. Contact Absorb for API access setup.

pricing.paid_tiers: Absorb LMS pricing per active learner per month
pricing.notes: Canadian company. Enterprise LMS pricing. Contact Absorb sales for pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per client; contact Absorb for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee learning and assessment data is sensitive HR data
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Authentication requires session token generation from credentials — not simple API key
No webhooks — must poll for completion status changes
API documentation less comprehensive than market leaders like Docebo or Cornerstone
Canadian company — CA data residency available, which may be required for some orgs
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee learning records. SOC2, GDPR. Session token auth. CA data residency available.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee learning data. SOC2, GDPR. Session token auth. CA data residency.
